description:
Create a new reference of type 'Dataset' for the 'Supreme Court Database' in the Juris-M library. The reference must include the following metadata:
- Title: The Supreme Court Database
- Author: Harold J. Spaeth (Last: Spaeth, First: Harold J.)
- Date: 2023
- Repository: Washington University School of Law
- URL: http://scdb.wustl.edu
- Format: Data file
